title: EFL Calendar Event
description: Schema for files under a pack's calendar/ folder. One JSON file per calendar/world event. Requires the 'calendar' feature in the .efl manifest.

id.description: Unique identifier for this calendar event within the pack. Used as the registry key and for once-only fire tracking.

displayName.description: Human-readable name shown in tooling. Optional.

season.description: Which FoM season this event activates in. 'any' (or omitted) lets it fire in every season.

oneOf.description: Raw FoM season encoding (0=spring, 1=summer, 2=fall, 3=winter). Prefer the string form.

dayOfSeason.description: Day-of-season the event activates on. Omit to match every day.

condition.description: Optional trigger id evaluated by TriggerService before activating. Empty/omitted means 'always satisfied'.

onActivate.description: Optional story event id to fire through StoryBridge when the event activates.

lifecycle.description: How often the event re-activates. 'daily' fires every matching day. 'once' fires the first matching day and never again.

once.description: Legacy alias for lifecycle: 'once'. If both are present, 'lifecycle' wins.
